title: Mob Vote: Faithful
description: The pack that adds the Mob Vote entities.
body:
## The pack that adds the Mob Vote entities.
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/mob-vote-faithful)




This pack adds 5 entities from the mob votes, excluding the Phantom and Glow Squid as they are already in the game. Entities: - The Lurker - Random squid spawn - The Great Hunger - Random spider spawn - The Blaze Knight - Random blaze spawn - The Iceologer - Evokers spawned in cold biomes - The Moobloom - Cows sspawned in flower biomes
